_comment: QrGate Pterodactyl egg. Import via Admin > Nests > Import Egg. Requires the Pterodactyl-compatible image (Dockerfile.pterodactyl): redwolf2467/qrgate:pterodactyl. No variables are required to start — configure everything in the /install wizard, including the security key.
name: QrGate
author: support@avocloud.net
description: QrGate — web-based ticketing and access control. All-in-one container (Python backend + PHP frontend + nginx). Start it, then open the /install setup wizard to configure everything online.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
# QrGate ships fully baked into the Docker image; the install step only needs
# to make sure the persistent data directories exist in the server volume.
mkdir -p /mnt/server/data /mnt/server/codes
echo 'QrGate install complete. Start the server, then open the /install wizard.'

variables.name: Auth / API key (optional)
variables.description: Optional. Leave blank to start with a bootstrap key and set a real one in the /install wizard (recommended). If set, it is the shared secret for backend + frontend.
